elements.text: In a conversation with a friend today, they say something slightly offensive and they do not seem to realize that it may have made you uncomfortable. You confront them about their comment and why it was offensive, and you worry in the moment that they may be angry at you. When you hear their reponse, they are thankful you communicated with them and...

elements.name: confronting_a_friend_--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
